content.title: Redesigning checkout to reduce drop-off
content.summary: Led end-to-end redesign that cut checkout abandonment by 34% in 8 weeks.

content.body: Users were abandoning checkout at a 67% rate. Most drop-off happened on the payment step. The existing flow hadn't been updated in 4 years and wasn't mobile-optimized.

content.text: The new checkout feels like a completely different product. Our mobile conversion finally matches desktop.

content.body: Running research before wireframes saved 2 weeks of rework. Next time I'd test with mobile-first users earlier — desktop bias crept into early wireframes and we caught it late.
